wallet-state.description: Get wallet setup state from KeyringController and OnboardingController. Note: isUnlocked is runtime-only and not persisted to storage — use mm_get_state for live lock status.
wallet-state.expression: (async () => { const s = await chrome.storage.local.get('data'); const kc = s?.data?.KeyringController; const oc = s?.data?.OnboardingController; return JSON.stringify({ hasVault: !!kc?.vault, completedOnboarding: oc?.completedOnboarding ?? false }); })()

accounts.expression: (async () => { const s = await chrome.storage.local.get('data'); const accts = s?.data?.AccountsController?.internalAccounts; const selId = accts?.selectedAccount; return JSON.stringify({ selectedAccount: accts?.accounts?.[selId] ?? null, selectedAccountId: selId ?? null }); })()

network.expression: (async () => { const s = await chrome.storage.local.get('data'); const n = s?.data?.NetworkController; return JSON.stringify({ selectedNetworkClientId: n?.selectedNetworkClientId ?? null, chainId: n?.providerConfig?.chainId ?? null }); })()
